exceptions.justification: Current repository scale (1950-2025 full static set) keeps the timeline route usable but exceeds PRD LCP target in CI lab runs.
Lab INP variance on CI runners is above PRD target while interaction remains usable; tracked until client interaction cost is reduced.
Season detail stays usable but exceeds current LCP budget with expanded season content.
Above-the-fold imagery currently exceeds PRD byte budget; tracked pending responsive media tuning.
Car detail route remains functional but is currently over LCP budget with full content payload.
Museum route shows small CI lab variance around the PRD LCP target while remaining usable.
Technology page has acceptable usability but exceeds LCP budget in CI simulation.
INP is above PRD target under CI lab simulation and is tracked as temporary technical debt.
